items.docs: Sends a transactional SMS message to a recipient phone number. Supports customizable sender names and message content. The message is delivered immediately for time-sensitive notifications.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the event query in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the event query in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: phoneNumber
params.description: Filter events by recipient phone number.

params.name: event
params.description: Filter by event type such as delivered, sent, softBounce, hardBounce, or unsubscribed.

params.name: tags
params.description: Filter events by tag assigned to the SMS.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed event-level data for transactional SMS messages including delivery status, bounces, and recipient interactions.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: days
params.description: Number of days for the report, starting from today.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed delivery reports for transactional SMS messages over a specified date range. Returns per-day statistics for sent, delivered, and bounced messages.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for the report in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: days
params.description: Number of days for the report, starting from today.

items.docs: Retrieves aggregated statistics for transactional SMS activity over a specified period. Returns totals for sent, delivered, and bounced messages.
